case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. RICHARD B STINE INC et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARD B STINE INC STINE, RICHARD B DOES ONE THROUGH TEN INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-06-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-07-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-21-2007

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RICHARD B STINE INC STINE, RICHARD B $22,312.59 PRINCIPAL, $2,575.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $354.38 INTEREST, $395.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,636.97, IT IF FURTHER ORDER AND ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST IS THE OWNER OF THE FOLLOWING LEASED EQUIPMENT: ONE NEW JCB 1110T SKID STEER S/N SLP 110SA3E0888575, WHICH EQUIPMENT COLLECTIVELY HAS A FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $30,000.00 AND IS ENTITLED TO ITS IMMEDIATE POSSESSION, AND THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER SAID PROPERTY FROM DEFENDANT. IN THE EVENT PLAINTIFF, BANK OF THE WEST, OBTAINS POSSESSION AND SELLS SAID PERSONAL PROPERTY HEREAFTER, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE ALL CREDITS TO WHICH THEY ARE ENTITLED BY LAW (SEE SCANNED DOC)
